title: 日本ダービーの後に・磨穿鉄硯

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: And so my dreams are dashed.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But my resolve remains, awaiting the day that I
realize my ideals.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If strength is the mark of a ruler, then I still have
one chance left to prove mine.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Precisely. It is said that the Kikuka Sho goes to
the strongest Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Let us show the world that the Emperor does not
yield.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, we decide to aim for the Kikuka Sho
as planned.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Fine work today, President.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The result may not have been what you hoped,
but you raced with dignity.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I may have failed to meet your expectations
today, but I swear that next time, I will return
victorious.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You mean...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, I intend to aim for the Kikuka Sho. My
march of conquest is not yet done.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I have no doubt that you will acquit yourself.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But surely you realize that this will strain your
schedule to the limit?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Summer may be coming, but you will have more
press interviews than ever. And naturally, the
student council will be—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: President?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: No, I'm listening. Please, continue.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: With respect, you do look rather tired.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Forgive me. Even I can't maintain perfect
form after a race like that.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps you should refrain from student council
work for a little—

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I believe we have already discussed that point.
Let's move on to something more constructive.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
To pick up on your earlier point, the student
council has important work to do come the
summer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Come now, Trainer. Surely you haven't forgotten.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Every year, the academy holds a summer camp to
help the students improve their racing skills. The
student council helps to organize it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that reminds me. Air Groove, can you contact
the bus company?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We need to change the number of buses we'll be
hiring, and there are also some other issues I want
to discuss.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That being said, the press is outside, and I can
hardly keep them waiting. Let's see now...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'll be back at the academy in two hours. Could
you set up the meeting for when I return?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Of course.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after the grueling ordeal that was the
Japanese Derby, Symboli Rudolf shows no signs
of relaxing her unforgiving schedule.
